steps.title: Match established to its noun
steps.content: The opening phrase Established in 1936 by Richard Wright must modify the thing established. That thing is the South Side Writers Group, not Chicago, writers generally, or a forum alone.

steps.title: Keep the second clause linked
steps.content: B, C, and D start with subjects the modifier cannot describe. The semicolon then lets it refer back to the South Side Writers Group becoming part of the Chicago Black Renaissance. The answer is A.
